description: You are a radiologic technologist performing a systematic multi-window CT quality review for an attending radiologist. Using the CT scan from /home/ga/DICOM/studies/multiwindow_ct/, perform a comprehensive survey across four window presets: lung, bone, soft tissue, and mediastinal. For each window, identify and measure one diagnostically relevant anatomical structure, annotate it, and export the view as a PNG file to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/. Record the window preset, the structure measured, and the measurement value for all four windows in a survey report at /home/ga/DICOM/exports/multiwindow_survey_report.txt.

metadata.clinical_scenario: Multi-window CT quality survey for systematic pathology review
